name: German Apple Cake-Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core 3 medium apples, then slice them.
2. Break the egg into a bowl and beat it.
3. Blend in the granulated sugar and milk until thoroughly mixed.
4. Add 1 cup of Bake it all mix to the batter and mix until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into an 8-inch round cake pan that has been greased with shortening on the bottom.
6. Mix together 1/4 cup of Bake it all mix, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
7. Sprinkle half of this mixture over the batter in the cake pan.
8. Arrange the apple slices in rows on top of the batter.
9. Sprinkle the remaining mixture over the apples.
10. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for about 40 minutes.
11. Serve warm with cream or whipped cream.
Yield: One 8-inch round cake
